WhatsApp Commerce

Turn WhatsApp into Your Storefront

  1. Home
  2. Products
  3. WhatsApp Commerce
WhatsApp Business API

Sell Where Your Customers Already Are

Transform WhatsApp into a powerful sales channel. Enable customers to discover, browse, and purchase your products without ever leaving the chat. With 500M+ Indians on WhatsApp, meet your customers where they spend their time.

Our WhatsApp Commerce platform combines product catalogs, native payments, automated checkout, and CRM integrations - everything you need to run a complete storefront on WhatsApp.

Customer Engagement
Features

Complete Commerce Solution

Everything you need to sell on WhatsApp, in one platform.

Product Catalogs

Showcase your products with rich catalogs inside WhatsApp. Categories, images, descriptions, and pricing - all browsable in chat.

Native Payments

Accept payments directly in WhatsApp with UPI, cards, net banking, and WhatsApp Pay. No redirects, no friction.

Automated Checkout

AI-powered chatbot collects shipping details, applies discounts, and sends payment links automatically. 24/7 sales on autopilot.

Bulk Campaigns

Send promotional messages, new arrivals, and offers to thousands of customers. Segment by purchase history and preferences.

Order Tracking

Automated order confirmations, shipping updates, and delivery notifications. Keep customers informed at every step.

Analytics Dashboard

Track sales, conversions, popular products, and customer behavior. Data-driven insights to grow your business.

How It Works

From Browse to Buy in 3 Steps

Seamless shopping experience without leaving WhatsApp.

1

Browse Catalog

Customer sends "Hi" or clicks your WhatsApp link. Bot shows product categories and catalog for easy browsing.

2

Add to Cart

Customer selects products, chooses variants (size, color), and adds to cart. Bot collects shipping address.

3

Pay & Track

Secure payment via UPI/cards. Order confirmed instantly. Real-time shipping updates until delivery.

Industries

Built for Every Business

From local shops to enterprise brands.

Fashion & Apparel

Size guides, new arrivals alerts, and personalized recommendations.

Food & Restaurant

Menu browsing, order taking, and delivery tracking.

Electronics

Specs comparison, warranty info, and support requests.

Grocery & FMCG

Quick reorders, subscription deliveries, and freshness updates.

Beauty & Cosmetics

Product recommendations, tutorials, and restock reminders.

Pharmacy

Prescription uploads, medicine orders, and refill reminders.

Jewelry

Catalog sharing, custom orders, and appointment booking.

Education

Course enrollment, material delivery, and doubt resolution.

Pricing

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

Starter

For small businesses getting started

Free
  • Up to 100 conversations/month
  • 1 WhatsApp number
  • Product catalog (50 items)
  • Basic chatbot flows
  • Order notifications
  • Email support

Growth

For growing businesses

₹2,499/month
  • Unlimited conversations
  • 2 WhatsApp numbers
  • Unlimited products

  • Bulk campaigns (5000/month)
  • Payment integrations
  • Analytics dashboard

Custom
